subject: Sawk, a blue humanoid martial arts creature in a karate stance on rocky mountain terrain
description: A tall, blue, broadly-built humanoid creature stands in a wide karate stance on rocky mountain terrain. The figure wears a white gi-like wrap around its torso, has a round head with a stern expression, and holds one hand raised in a guard or striking pose. A snow-capped mountain peak rises in the background under a blue sky with white clouds. The rocky ground is broken and uneven. The posture and expression convey intense focus and martial discipline.
foreground: blue humanoid creature in wide karate stance wearing white gi wrap
background: rocky mountain terrain with snow-capped peak and blue sky
